docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FENG, ERIK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF ERIK FENG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON BAKHTIAR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FENG, ERIK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKHTIAR, BRANDON $834.83 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $884.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
